hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-bold
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-semibold

components.name: Hero Section
components.description: Full-width hero with bold animated headline, floating geometric patterns (via CSS keyframes), and primary CTA. High contrast with deep navy text on warm off-white background.
components.styles: relative overflow-hidden min-h-[90vh] flex flex-col justify-center bg-[var(--ims-paper,#FAF8F4)] z-10
components.animations: Use Tailwind animate-in, slide-in-from-bottom, fade-in for text entrance. Use custom CSS keyframes in global CSS for floating geometric particles (translateY and rotate animations).

components.name: Portal Entry Cards
components.description: Four portal entry cards (Admin, Student, Trainer, Public Verification).
components.styles: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-[var(--ims-brass,#c47d46)]/20 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(20,33,61,0.04)] rounded-2xl p-8 hover:-translate-y-2 hover:shadow-[0_16px_48px_rgba(20,33,61,0.12)] transition-all duration-500 ease-out group
components.layout: col-span-1 md:col-span-6 lg:col-span-3 flex flex-col items-start gap-4

components.name: Feature Highlights
components.description: Key IMS capabilities presented in a bento-style grid to break symmetry.
components.styles: bg-[var(--ims-surface,#FFFFFF)] rounded-3xl p-10 sm:p-12 border border-[var(--ims-border,#e8e4db)] overflow-hidden relative
components.layout: Grid using varied spans (e.g., md:col-span-8 and md:col-span-4) for asymmetrical tension.

components.name: Animated Statistics Counter
components.description: Bold, large serif numbers for statistics, separated by thin 1px borders.
components.styles: border-y border-[var(--ims-border,#e8e4db)] py-16 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8 text-center divide-x divide-[var(--ims-border,#e8e4db)]
components.typography: Numbers in text-6xl Cormorant Garamond text-[var(--ims-ink,#14213d)], labels in text-sm Manrope uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[var(--ims-brass,#c47d46)]

components.name: Footer
components.description: Deep navy background footer with warm off-white text and brass accents.
components.typography: Logo/Heading in text-4xl Cormorant Garamond, links in text-sm Manrope.

motion_and_interactions.general: No Framer Motion. Use pure CSS and Tailwind utility classes for all animations.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards elevate (hover:-translate-y-2) and increase shadow. Buttons have a slight scale (hover:scale-105) and background color shift. Icons in cards shift right (group-hover:translate-x-1).
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-in-up animations for grid items using standard CSS keyframes with animation-delay.
motion_and_interactions.particles: CSS keyframes `@keyframes float { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-20px) rotate(5deg); } }` applied to absolute positioned decorative SVGs in the Hero.

images.description: Abstract geometric architecture, used as a subtle, low-opacity background element or clip-path feature in the hero.
Professional students in library, used for the Student Portal card or feature section.
Modern university campus building, used for Admin Portal card or institution highlights.

media.icons: lucide-react (Standard minimalist icons for portals and features)

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA/WCAG standards. Primary text on off-white background is highly accessible.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (cards, buttons, links) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid="admin-portal-card", data-testid="hero-cta-button").

instructions_to_main_agent: Create the landing page in apps/admin-portal/app/page.js using Next.js App Router.
Use pure CSS keyframes in the global CSS (or a local css module) for floating particles and entrance animations.
Use standard Tailwind CSS classes for layout and hover effects.
Utilize existing CSS variables if available (--ims-paper, --ims-surface, --ims-ink, --ims-brass, --ims-muted, --ims-border), otherwise default to the hex codes provided.
All cards should use a glass-morphism effect (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80) or a soft drop shadow on a white background, elevating on hover.
Load Cormorant Garamond and Manrope fonts via next/font/google.
Use the specific images provided in the media section to enrich the visual design.
Keep it a Server Component, no 'use client' unless absolutely required (which shouldn't be the case with CSS-only animations).
